William Bellor-Yeh, Esq., Quill & Arrow, LLP (310) 933-4271 service@quillarrowlaw.com Attorney for Plaintiff ELBA ZEPEDA ARAGON
Sharon L. Stewart,Esq., ONGARO PC (415) 433-3900 sstewart@ongaropc.com Attorney for Defendant

Haearing is held. Discussed not ARGUED. Counsel represented to the Court that the case has settled. The Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SUBARU OF AMERICA, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and takes the matter off calendar pursuant to counsel's representation that this case has settled.
